title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 630.850 - Compact enacted — form
text:
630.850.  Compact enacted — form. — The "Interstate Compact on the Mentally Disordered Offender", hereinafter called "the compact", is hereby enacted into law and entered into with all other jurisdictions legally joining therein, in the form substantially as contained in section 630.855.
(L. 1980 H.B. 1724)
